name: Tenderloin of Beef with Three Citrus Sauces
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim and tie the tenderloin.
2. Place the tenderloin in a hot pan and sear with oil until browned on all sides.
3. Deglaze the pan with a small amount of red wine, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
4. Add the chopped onions and cook until they begin to soften.
5. Incorporate the lemon juice, lime juice, and orange juice into the pan, followed by the remaining red wine.
6. Reduce the sauce over low heat until it thickens slightly.
7. Whisk in the butter until melted and incorporated into the sauce.
8. Slice the tenderloin and serve on top of the citrus sauce.
